smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts, becoming northerlies.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 2 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, becoming easterlies.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds, occasionally force 5.
